ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_metrics" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number during training */,
  "elapsed" REAL /* Elapsed time during training */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value during training */,
  "acc" REAL /* Accuracy value during training */,
  "val_loss" REAL /* Validation loss value */,
  "val_acc" REAL /* Validation accuracy value */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who trained the model */,
  "training_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training session */,
  "training_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training session */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for training the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training */,
  "compute_resources" TEXT /* Compute resources used for training */,
  "model_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "version_id", "epoch")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "deployment_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was deployed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model is deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id")
)
